description: Human hand shown mid-action (pouring liquid, placing object, gesturing). Action freeze creates implied motion.
structural_recipe: Human hand shown mid-action (pouring liquid, placing object, gesturing). Action freeze creates implied motion.
why_it_works: Saudi hospitality gesture (right-hand-only) becomes content. Universal across sectors.
transplantation_caveats: MUST be right-hand. Left-hand is HARD_BLOCK (universal forbidden).
